nameMeanings.name: Luss
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from a short form of the old personal name Duso, Tuzzo. This surname is rare in Germany.
Hungarian: unexplained. This surname is rare in Hungary.

nameMeanings.name: Godfrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old French name Godefroy, which is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from god ‘god’ (or gōd ‘good’) + fred, frid ‘peace’. This was adopted by the Normans, and brought to England by immigrants from the Low Countries and France. It was borne by a Norman saint ( c.1066–1115 ) who became bishop of Amiens. There has been considerable confusion with Geoffrey .

en.lifeSummary: Godriful Godfrey Luss was born in 1290, in Luss, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom as the son of Malcolm de Luss - Fifth Lord of Luss. He had at least 1 daughter with Mrs Godriful Godfrey Luss. He died in 1385, in Luss, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 95.

ko.lifeSummary: Godriful Godfrey Luss(은)는 1290년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 루스에서 Malcolm de Luss - Fifth Lord of Luss의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Mrs Godriful Godfrey Luss(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1385년 영국 스코틀랜드 던바토실르 루스에서 95세의 나이로 사망했다.
